title: TYROLIT 223035 BASIC Metal Cutting Discs for Steel - Universal Cut Off Wheels - Angle Grinder Discs - 300 x 3.5 x 20 mm - 10-Pack
features: UNIVERSAL CUT OFF WHEELS: The TYROLIT BASIC cutting disc is designed for electric or petrol cut off machines, featuring a rugged construction that cuts through large steel cross-sections quickly and easily.
10 PACK: Each set contains 10 angle grinder cutting discs, measuring 300 mm x 3.5 mm, with a 20 mm bore. Suitable for professional tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts.

POWERFUL PERFORMANCE: Designed with 2 external reinforcements, this thin cutting disc is ideal for machining steel, cutting profiles, and solid materials. The internal reinforcement and rough side surfaces ensure low burr cutting of workpieces.
FAST & EASY: Developed for use on powerful stationary and portable cut off machines, the cut off wheel delivers high stock removal performance with minimal exertion and reduced cutting times.
TYROLIT BASIC: Our BASIC range of metal discs is for home projects and job site work. An ideal introduction to TYROLIT's wide range of professional grade abrasives.
description: TYROLIT's BASIC range of cut-off wheels is designed for everyday use and universal applications – the perfect introduction to TYROLIT's wide range of professional-grade abrasives. TYROLIT BASIC cutting discs for angle grinder use provide high stock removal performance with minimal effort and reduced cutting times, making quick work of various steel cutting tasks and reducing the need for frequent wheel changes. The disc is designed with two external reinforcements, allowing it to easily cut profiles, solid materials, and large cross-sections, producing consistently excellent results even after multiple uses. Made with convenience in mind, these discs can be used on a wide range of electric or petrol-powered cut-off angle grinders, as well as powerful stationary grinding machines, providing cost-efficient, reliable cutting solutions for everyday use. TYROLIT is a founding member of the Organisation for the Safety of Abrasives. We have always prioritised the safety of our customers in our product designs, giving you total peace of mind with every job. Immerse yourself in TYROLIT's range of quality discs and experience cutting-edge technology with every cut.
